items.title: VerifiedX brings privacy layer to Bitcoin as institutional demand for confidentiality grows
items.summary: A new zero-knowledge-powered system enables shielded bitcoin transactions, reflecting a broader push across crypto to address the “privacy gap” keeping institutions off public blockchains.

items.title: UAE investors buy AI dip, keep crypto exposure despite conflict
items.summary: UAE investors are buying the AI and tech dip, keeping exposure to software, chips and crypto as the Iran conflict stress-tests the Gulf’s bid to be a global tech hub.

items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

items.title: OneCoin’s fallout lingers as US victims get a shot at recovery
items.summary: Investors in the cryptocurrency Ponzi scheme OneCoin may finally get some relief through a Department of Justice program, some 12 years after the project launched.

items.title: Ukraine arrests FBI-wanted cybercrime suspect, seizes $11M in assets
items.summary: Ukrainian authorities detained a suspect linked to a $100 million cybercrime network targeting the US and Europe, seizing $11 million in assets, of which $3 million was in cryptocurrency.

items.title: Wall Street trading-tech is coming to crypto as DoubleZero rolls out high-speed data for Solana
